brand.title: Fashion that honors who you are
brand.text: Tichel & Co. was born from the belief that head coverings can be both beautiful and dignified. We design luxury head coverings from premium fabrics — because women who cover with intention deserve fashion at the highest level.

custom.title: Dreaming of a unique design?
custom.text: Send us your vision and we'll design a custom head covering for you — fabric, color, style, and size exactly as you imagined.
